items.name: Virtuoso Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🎼 Elegance in Every Note, Style in Every Step!
This flowing white coat is inspired by classical sophistication, featuring violin-shaped accents along the waist for a truly artistic touch. Its pristine design blends fashion with music, making it perfect for roleplay, concerts, or stylish avatars who want to stand out.

💡 Why You’ll Love It
Elegant white flowing design with musical details 🎻
Unique violin-inspired accents for a creative aesthetic
Perfect for formal roleplay, concerts, or fantasy outfits
A statement piece that combines art, music, and fashion

🔍 Keywords: coat, white, elegant, violin, music, classical, roleplay, artistic, fashion, PBR
Step onto the stage with grace and let your style play the melody!
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.

items.name: 🖤「Midnight Crest Coat [PBR]」
items.description:
A timeless black coat with shining silver buttons, echoing the dignity of tradition and the edge of modern rebellion.
Whether you wear it as a symbol of discipline or as a statement of cool defiance, this coat will make you stand tall in style.
✨ Features
Sleek black fabric with PBR depth
Silver button details for contrast
Traditional cut with a modern vibe
Perfect for dramatic, cool avatars
🔍 Keywords: black coat, Japanese style, retro, formal, cool

Step into the spotlight with the Crimson Rose Noble Coat, a masterpiece of aristocratic fashion. Crafted in deep black with crimson floral embroidery and golden buttons, this coat radiates sophistication with a hint of mystery. Perfect for noble gatherings, masquerades, or gothic fantasy roleplay.

Golden accents & buttons for noble refinement
PBR materials for realistic depth and shine
Perfect for royalty, vampire, or gothic roleplay themes

items.name: Fallen Archangel Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🌑Cloaked in Darkness, Bound by Power 🌑
Step into the shadows with the Fallen Archangel Coat—a long, ominous garment that radiates dark elegance. The flowing black-and-red robes combined with massive raven-black wings and demonic horns create a look of both terror and majesty. This is the perfect attire for those who walk the thin line between angel and demon.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Dark, regal coat with flowing textures and layered detail
Massive black wings for an intimidating presence
Demonic horn accents to complete the fallen look
Built with PBR textures for realistic shadows, fabric depth, and shine
🔍 Keywords: fallen angel, dark wings, demon, gothic coat, villain, shadow, Roblox outfit, PBR
⚔️ Embrace the forbidden power and command respect with every step. This model includes high-quality PBR textures.
